title: bromus auriculatus
intro: Bromus auriculatus, also known as golden oat grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as constipation and diarrhea, due to its high fiber and antioxidant content. The health benefits of Bromus auriculatus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in soothing digestive issues and reducing the risk of infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
